title: Build a Shared-Basis HRF Library (SBHM) — sbhm_build
text: library_spec Either NULL (`library_H` provided) list : - `fun`: function compatible `fmrihrf::hrf_library(fun, pgrid, ...)`          returns `fmrihrf` HRF object called parameters. - `pgrid`: data.frame parameter combinations (see examples). - `span`: numeric, HRF span seconds (default `span`). - `precision`: numeric, evaluation precision (default 0.1 sec). - `method`: evaluation method `fmrihrf::evaluate()` (default "conv"). - `extras`: optional list additional arguments passed `hrf_library`. library_H Optional precomputed TxK matrix candidate HRFs, already aligned TR grid `tgrid` (`sframe`). Mutually exclusive `library_spec`. r Target rank shared basis (default 6). Clipped `min(T, K)`. sframe Optional `fmrihrf::sampling_frame`, used derive global time grid `tgrid` provided. tgrid Optional numeric vector global times (seconds). provided, takes precedence `sframe`. span HRF span seconds (default 32). Used reference HRF needed. normalize Logical, L2-normalize library columns (default TRUE). baseline Numeric length-2 vector specifying time window (seconds) used baseline removal (column-wise mean subtraction within window). Set NULL skip. shifts Optional numeric vector time shifts (seconds). provided, shifted copies library added linear interpolation `tgrid`. ref Reference coefficient-space shrinkage orientation. One `"mean"` (default) `"spmg1"`. `"spmg1"`, SPMG1 HRF projected onto learned basis form `alpha_ref`.

title: Build a Shared-Basis HRF Library (SBHM) — sbhm_build
text: list components:   - `B` (Txr): shared orthonormal time basis   - `S` (length r): singular values   - `` (rxK): coordinates library HRFs shared basis   - `tgrid`: global time grid used (seconds)   - `span`: span used reference HRF   - `ref`: list `alpha_ref` (length r) `name`   - `meta`: list `r`, `K`, `normalize`, `baseline`

what: Match Voxels to Library HRFs in Shared Basis (SBHM) — sbhm_match
title: Match Voxels to Library HRFs in Shared Basis (SBHM) — sbhm_match
text: Given per-voxel aggregate coefficients `beta_bar` shared basis `B`, library coordinates ``, perform shape-matching whitened, L2-normalized coefficient space (cosine similarity). Optionally apply simple shrinkage `beta_bar` towards reference coordinate matching, orientation fix.

title: Match Voxels to Library HRFs in Shared Basis (SBHM) — sbhm_match
code: sbhm_match(   beta_bar,   S,   A,   shrink = list(tau = 0, ref = NULL, snr = NULL),   topK = 1,   whiten = TRUE,   sv_floor_rel = 1e-06,   whiten_power = 1,   orient_ref = TRUE )

title: Match Voxels to Library HRFs in Shared Basis (SBHM) — sbhm_match
text: beta_bar Numeric matrix (r×V): per-voxel coefficients prepass GLM SBHM basis. Columns correspond voxels. S Numeric vector (length r): singular values library SVD. Numeric matrix (r×K): coordinates library HRFs SBHM basis. shrink List optional shrinkage options: - `tau` numeric >=0: global strength (default 0, .e., shrinkage). - `ref` numeric length-r vector (alpha_ref) NULL. NULL, uses   mean columns. Shrinkage : beta_bar <- (1-lambda) beta_bar + lambda ref. - `snr` optional numeric length-V estimates; provided, per-voxel   lambda_v = tau/(snr_v + tau). Otherwise lambda = tau. topK Integer, return top-K scores/weights >1 (default 1). whiten Logical, divide coefficients S normalization (default TRUE). sv_floor_rel Relative singular-value floor used `whiten=TRUE` (default `1e-6`). whiten_power Numeric `[0, 1]` controlling whitening strength `whiten=TRUE`. Uses division `S^whiten_power` (`1` = full whitening, `0.5` = partial whitening, `0` = whitening). Default `1`. orient_ref Logical, flip beta_bar columns dot `ref` negative matching (default TRUE).

title: Match Voxels to Library HRFs in Shared Basis (SBHM) — sbhm_match
text: list :   - `idx` length-V integer indices best-matching library HRF (1..K)   - `margin` length-V numeric: score(top1) - score(top2)   - `alpha_hat` r×V matrix: selected library coordinates (unwhitened, unnormalized)   - `scores` optional K×V cosine score matrix (returned topK > 1)   - `weights` optional top-K weights per voxel (topK > 1)

title: Match Voxels to Library HRFs in Shared Basis (SBHM) — sbhm_match
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{   set.seed(42)   r <- 4; K <- 12; V <- 3   A <- matrix(rnorm(r*K), r, K)   S <- seq(1, 0.2, length.out = r)   alpha2 <- A[,2]   beta_bar <- cbind(alpha2 + rnorm(r, sd = 0.1),                     A[,7] + rnorm(r, sd = 0.1),                     A[,10] + rnorm(r, sd = 0.1))   m <- sbhm_match(beta_bar, S, A)   m$idx } # }

what: SBHM Prepass: Aggregate Fit in Shared Basis — sbhm_prepass
title: SBHM Prepass: Aggregate Fit in Shared Basis — sbhm_prepass
text: Compute per-voxel coefficients shared SBHM basis fitting single aggregate GLM one regressor per basis column (trials summed), optionally residualizing nuisances prewhitening. produces `beta_bar` (r×V) can feed `sbhm_match()`.

title: SBHM Prepass: Aggregate Fit in Shared Basis — sbhm_prepass
code: sbhm_prepass(   Y,   sbhm,   design_spec,   Nuisance = NULL,   prewhiten = NULL,   ridge = list(mode = "fractional", lambda = 0.01, alpha_ref = NULL),   data_fac = NULL )

title: SBHM Prepass: Aggregate Fit in Shared Basis — sbhm_prepass
text: Y Numeric matrix T×V fMRI time series. sbhm SBHM object `sbhm_build()` (must contain B, S, , tgrid, span). design_spec List describing events (shape `oasis$design_spec`). Must contain `sframe` `cond` `onsets` (optional `duration`, `amplitude`, `span`). `cond$hrf` ignored replaced `sbhm_hrf`. Optional `others` (list conditions) aggregated nuisances. Nuisance Optional T×P nuisance matrix (motion, drift, etc.). prewhiten Optional fmriAR prewhitening options (see `?lss`). provided, Y design prewhitened together. ridge Optional list targeted ridge shrinkage prepass solve: - `mode`: "fractional" (default) "absolute". Fractional scales mean(diag(G)). - `lambda`: nonnegative scalar (default 0.01 fractional mode). - `alpha_ref`: r-vector shrink towards (default zero vector). data_fac Optional list external factorization: `scores` (T×q), `loadings` (q×V). provided, computes X'Y via (X'Scores) × Loadings. PR2 version, prewhitening applied `data_fac` used.

title: SBHM Prepass: Aggregate Fit in Shared Basis — sbhm_prepass
text: List :   - `beta_bar` r×V aggregate coefficients   - `A_agg`   T×r aggregated per-basis design (residualization/whitening)   - `G`       r×r crossprod A_agg   - `diag`    list K=r, ntrials, times, used_prewhiten

title: SBHM Prepass: Aggregate Fit in Shared Basis — sbhm_prepass
text: Notes: - Aggregated per-basis regressors can highly collinear, making G = '   ill-conditioned. small ridge recommended stability. default   uses fractional mode `lambda = 0.01` (scaled mean(diag(G))). - `data_fac` provided (factorized data path), prewhitening skipped   version; dense factorized paths perform nuisance   residualization consistently.

title: SBHM Prepass: Aggregate Fit in Shared Basis — sbhm_prepass
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{   library(fmrihrf)   set.seed(1)   Tlen <- 120; V <- 5; r <- 4   sframe <- sampling_frame(blocklens = Tlen, TR = 1)   H <- cbind(exp(-seq(0, 30, length.out = Tlen)/4),              exp(-seq(0, 30, length.out = Tlen)/6))   sbhm <- sbhm_build(library_H = H, r = r, sframe = sframe, normalize = TRUE)   onsets <- seq(5, 95, by = 10)   design_spec <- list(sframe = sframe, cond = list(onsets = onsets, duration = 0, span = 30))   hrf_B <- sbhm_hrf(sbhm$B, sbhm$tgrid, sbhm$span)   rr <- fmrihrf::regressor(onsets = onsets, hrf = hrf_B, duration = 0, span = 30, summate = FALSE)   X <- fmrihrf::evaluate(rr, grid = sbhm$tgrid, precision = 0.1, method = "conv")   betas_true <- matrix(rnorm(r), r)   Y <- matrix(rnorm(Tlen*V, sd = 0.5), Tlen, V)   Y[,1] <- Y[,1] + X %*% betas_true   pre <- sbhm_prepass(Y, sbhm, design_spec)   str(pre) } # }

what: Project Trial-wise SBHM Coefficients to Scalar Amplitudes — sbhm_project
title: Project Trial-wise SBHM Coefficients to Scalar Amplitudes — sbhm_project
text: Given trial-wise coefficients shared basis (rxntrialsxV) voxel-specific matched library coordinates `alpha_hat` (rxV), compute scalar amplitudes per trial voxel via least-squares projection: `= (alpha' beta) / (alpha' alpha)`.

title: Project Trial-wise SBHM Coefficients to Scalar Amplitudes — sbhm_project
code: sbhm_project(beta_rt, alpha_hat)

title: Project Trial-wise SBHM Coefficients to Scalar Amplitudes — sbhm_project
text: beta_rt 3D array shape r x ntrials x V containing per-trial coefficients SBHM basis (returned OASIS K=r, reshaped). alpha_hat Numeric matrix rxV matched library coordinates per voxel (e.g., `sbhm_match()$alpha_hat`). coordinate system `beta_rt` (unwhitened, L2-normalized) interpretable amplitudes.

title: Project Trial-wise SBHM Coefficients to Scalar Amplitudes — sbhm_project
text: Numeric matrix ntrials x V scalar amplitudes.

title: Project Trial-wise SBHM Coefficients to Scalar Amplitudes — sbhm_project
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{   r <- nrow(alpha_hat)   ntrials <- nrow(beta_mat) / r   beta_rt <- array(beta_mat, dim = c(r, ntrials, ncol(beta_mat)))   amps <- sbhm_project(beta_rt, alpha_hat) } # }

title: Construct stglmnet backend options — stglmnet_options
text: mode "cv" (default) selects lambda internal cross-validation, "fixed" uses supplied lambda sequence smallest fitted lambda scalar provided. alpha Elastic-net mixing parameter passed glmnet. lambda Optional lambda sequence (scalar fixed mode). overlap_strategy Trial-overlap penalty mapping. One "none", "multiplicative", "additive", "hybrid", "threshold". pool_to_mean Logical; reparameterize trial effects pooled mean plus orthogonal contrasts. pool_strength Penalty multiplier applied pooled contrasts. pool_mean_penalty Penalty applied pooled mean coefficient. whiten One "inherit" (default), "auto", "never", "always". "inherit" uses top-level prewhiten= argument . cv_folds Number folds used mode = "cv". cv_type.measure Cross-validation objective. cv_select Lambda selection rule CV mode. "optimal" uses best-scoring lambda, "1se" applies one-standard-error rule. return_fit Logical; TRUE, lss(method="stglmnet") returns list containing beta, fit metadata, selected lambda. ...
